'''Aeron''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the son of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was rescued by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] after the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raid on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. He and three other children helped Han load and tie [[Spice/Legends|spice]] that had to be jettisoned in order to evade arrest. Aeron was dropped off at a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] after [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] escorted the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
